title: Honda Smart Key System Failure Diagnostic Table by Symptom

blocks.text: Honda Smart Key System Failure Diagnostic Table by Symptom
Fault Diagnostics on the Honda Smart Key System
Based on defective phenomena, work and inspections will be performed.

items.text: Check the pre-inspection items before diagnosing a malfunction.
Refer to the Honda Smart Key System schematic for signal names.
If DTCs are displayed, diagnose the corresponding DTC failure.
Self-check the Honda Smart Key with HDS, and if there is a malfunction, inspect the relevant part first.

rows.text: symptoms
diagnostic procedure
checklist
Smart operation does not turn ON mode (backup operation (when smart key contacts ENGINE START STOP switch) also does not turn ON mode)
Failure Diagnosis by Symptom

Disconnection or short-circuit of SS1 (+) line Disconnection or short-circuit of SS2 (-) line ENGINE START STOP switch ESL PWR line disconnected or shorted Disconnection or short-circuit of MTR CUT1 (CONT) line Disconnection or short-circuit of MTR CUT2 (IG1) line ESL SW B/C/D line disconnected or shorted Disconnection or short-circuit of IGN TRX line Disconnection or short-circuit of MTR CONT line Honda Smart Key LF Antenna Electronic Steering Lock MICU
Smart operation does not turn ON mode, but backup operation (when smart key touches ENGINE START STOP switch) turns ON mode.
Failure Diagnosis by Symptom
Honda Smart Key Not Registered LF Antenna ENGINE START STOP switch
Backup operation (when smart key contacts ENGINE START STOP switch) does not turn ON mode, but smart operation does.
Failure Diagnosis by Symptom
ENGINE START STOP switch Honda Smart Key Not Registered MICU
Engine does not start (power supply is normal)
Failure Diagnosis by Symptom

Parking brake switch Disconnection or short circuit of PARKING BRAKE SW line Brake switch Disconnection or short-circuit of STOP SW line Shift position sensor Disconnection or short-circuit of ATP-P line Parking pin switch P-PIN SW line disconnected or shorted Disconnection or short-circuit of STS line ESL SW Disconnection or short-circuit of B line Disconnection or short-circuit of S-NET line Disconnection or short-circuit of IG1 MAIN line MICU
Can't turn it off.
Failure Diagnosis by Symptom

Disconnection or short-circuit of SS1 (+) line Disconnection or short-circuit of SS2 (-) line ENGINE START STOP switch MICU Parking pin switch P-PIN SW line disconnected or shorted Shift position sensor Disconnection or short-circuit of ATP-P line Disconnection or short-circuit of B-CAN line Disconnection or short-circuit of F-CAN line
Cannot be locked/unlocked by smart operation (lock/unlock switch) or keyless entry operation
Failure Diagnosis by Symptom

Honda Smart Key Not Registered Each door Switch Tailgate latch switch Disconnection or short-circuit of FR DOOR SW line Disconnection or short-circuit of OTHER DOOR SW line Door lock knob switch Blown No. C23 (15A), No. C35 (15A), No. C37 (15A), No. C38 (15A) fuses in fuse box No. C23 (15A), No. C35 (15A), No. C37 (15A), No. C38 (15A) fuse lines in fuse box disconnected or shorted Each door lock actuator Honda Smart Key LF Antenna MICU
Keyless Entry operation fails to lock/unlock door locks (normal for smart operation)
Failure Diagnosis by Symptom
Honda Smart Key LF Antenna MICU
Door locks cannot be locked/unlocked by smart operation (lock/unlock switch) (normal for keyless entry operation)
Failure Diagnosis by Symptom
Each door Switch Tailgate latch switch Disconnection or short-circuit of FR DOOR SW line Disconnection or short-circuit of OTHER DOOR SW line Honda Smart Key LF Antenna MICU
Door locks lock by itself
Failure Diagnosis by Symptom
MICU Each door Switch Tailgate latch switch Disconnection or short-circuit of FR DOOR SW line Disconnection or short-circuit of OTHER DOOR SW line
Lost key warning blows when in ACC/ON mode
Failure Diagnosis by Symptom
MICU LF Antenna Honda Smart Key
Smart warning light does not come on or go off
Failure Diagnosis by Symptom
Disconnection or short-circuit of B-CAN line Disconnection or short-circuit of F-CAN line Combination Meter MICU
Immobilizer indicator does not light or does not turn off
Failure Diagnosis by Symptom
Disconnection or short-circuit of B-CAN line Disconnection or short-circuit of F-CAN line Combination Meter PGM-FI ECU MICU
